assertions.description: The bobbycar board routes two UART channels (TX/RX and TX.1/RX.1) to multiple connectors, and the analyzer correctly identified all four UART nets in bus_analysis.uart. The UART1 connector is correctly recognized as a UART interface device. The L7805 5V regulator (U1) was correctly identified as an LDO power regulator with VDD input and VCC output.
